channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Commanders warned referees can 'award a score' after 4 penalties near goal line in loss to Eagles
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — The Washington Commanders jumped offsides four times in a sequence of five plays while trying to stop Philadelphia's vaunted tush push — earning them a warning from the referee that he could award the Eagles a touchdown if the Commanders did it again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford ruled out of AFC title game vs. Chiefs with a concussion
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Buffalo Bills cornerback Christian Benford was ruled out of the AFC title game against the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday night with a concussion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles reach fifth Super Bowl and second in 3 seasons, will face Bills or Chiefs
item.description: Saquon Barkley and the Philadelphia Eagles are running back to the Super Bowl for the second time in three years and fifth time in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Report: Cubs trade for Astros former All-Star closer
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a deal to acquire Houston Astros' former All-Star closer Ryan Pressly, according to reports. ESPN's Jeff Passan reports the trade is pending medical review and Pressly will waive his no-trade clause to facilitate the trade to Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bills cornerback Christian Benford clears concussion protocol, active for AFC title game vs Chiefs
item.description: Bills cornerback Christian Benford cleared the concussion protocol and was active for Sunday’s AFC championship game where he was expected to play a big role in helping to slow Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs’ passing game.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Eagles' Saquon Barkley shines in 1st half of NFC title game with TD runs of 60, 4 yards
item.description: Saquon Barkley sprinted 60 yards for a touchdown on his first carry of the NFC championship game and the Eagles running back had a 4-yard scoring run on his second carry to roaring “MVP.
item.dc:creator: Dan Gelston, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: South Carolina suspends DJ who controversially played song to troll LSU, Flau'jae Johnson
item.description: The University of South Carolina suspended a DJ who played a song by LSU star Flau'jae Johnson's late father after the team's win over the Tigers on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penske's pair of Porsches dominate as The Captain wins Rolex 24 at Daytona for 2nd consecutive year
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Roger Penske started his 59th season in motorsports the same way he closed last year — as a champion.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: Fans braved 30-degree temperatures to welcome home a team that beat five top-10 rivals on its way to the title, including Oregon in the Rose Bowl, Texas in the Cotton Bowl and Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff championship game.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kim Caldwell will coach her Lady Vols vs South Carolina week after giving birth
item.description: Kim Caldwell will be back on the sideline Monday night when her 17th-ranked Tennessee Lady Vols host the defending national champion South Carolina Gamecocks. Exactly one week after giving birth to her first child — a bouncing baby boy. “It's nice to be back,” Caldwell told reporters Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dolphins' Tyreek Hill chalks up 'I'm out' remark to 'frustration' with 2024 season
item.description: Miami Dolphins wide receiver Tyreek Hill explained on Saturday his frustration with the season was what led to his "I'm out" comments after their Week 18 loss.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jayden Daniels' mom reveals why Commanders rookie remains single heading into NFC Championship
item.description: If the Commanders upset the Eagles, a girlfriend-less Jayden Daniels would become the first rookie quarterback to lead an NFL team to the Super Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Broncos star Pat Surtain II earns high praise from Pro Football Hall of Famer Champ Bailey
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer Champ Bailey had a lot of good things to say about Denver Broncos cornerback Pat Surtian II during an interview with Fox News Digital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz drop fifth straight, losing at Memphis, 125-103
item.description: MEMPHIS (AP) - Jaren Jackson Jr. scored 28 points, Zach Edey added 19 points and four blocks and the Memphis Grizzlies won their sixth straight by beating the Utah Jazz 125-103 on Saturday night. Utah has now lost five in a row.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: UVU wins 10th straight game, beating Seattle 70-66
item.description: SEATTLE (ABC4 Sports) - There is no slowing down the Utah Valley men's basketball team right now. Carter Welling scored a career-high 24 points, and Dominick Nelson added 16 as Utah Valley earned a hard-fought 70-66 road win over Seattle U on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Fragile San Jose Sharks suffer worst home loss of season
item.description: San Jose Sharks' losing streak now at six as they allow four goals to Florida Panthers in second period
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Tyrese Maxey has 31 points and 9 assists in the 76ers' 109-97 victory over the Bulls
item.description: Tyrese Maxey had 31 points and nine assists, Kelly Oubre Jr. added 22 points and 12 rebounds and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Chicago Bulls 109-97 on Saturday night for their second straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No. 1 Auburn slips past No. 6 Tennessee 53-51 and extends its winning streak to 11 games
item.description: AUBURN, Ala. (AP) — Miles Kelly hit a go-ahead 3-pointer with 30 seconds remaining and Johni Broome had 16 points and 13 rebounds in his return to the lineup as No. 1 Auburn extended its winning streak to 11 games with a 53-51 win over No. 6 Tennessee on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: J’Wan Roberts scores 24 and No. 7 Houston downs No. 12 Kansas 92-86 in double OT
item.description: LAWRENCE, Kan. (AP) — J’Wan Roberts scored 24 points, including six in two overtime periods, and No. 7 Houston beat No. 12 Kansas 92-86 on Saturday night. Roberts hit two free throws with 13.9 seconds left in regulation to tie the game.
item.dc:creator: DAVID SMALE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris English holds off Sam Stevens by a shot in the Farmers Insurance Open at Torrey Pines
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Harris English clearly relishes a challenge. When he faced months of rehabilitation after hip surgery, he says he welcomed it. When he encounters ferocious wind or devilish course setups at his beloved Torrey Pines, he embraces the idea of thriving when par equals success.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets agree to terms with Broncos executive Darren Mougey to be their general manager
item.description: The New York Jets' lengthy searches are over, and they're pairing a first-time general manager with a first-time head coach to try to turn things around.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK JR., Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Bregman's door to re-sign with Astros is 'cracked' open, general manager says
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The door to re-signing free agent Alex Bregman is “cracked” open for Houston, but keeping the third baseman with the Astros might still be a long shot, general manager Dana Brown said Saturday.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: 49ers bring back Robert Saleh as defensive coordinator
item.description: (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers will fill their vacant defensive coordinator position with a familiar face. Robert Saleh will return to lead the team's defense after a tenure as the New York Jets' head coach, the 49ers announced Friday. Saleh was the 49ers' defensive coordinator from 2017-2020.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Aggies make 16 three-pointers in bounce-back win
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Following its first road loss of the season, the Utah State basketball team shot the lights out at the Spectrum in a 90-69 victory over Nevada Wednesday night. Ian Martinez led the way with 23 points, making 7 of 9 from beyond the arc. Utah State was 16-of-30 (.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs OC Liam Coen withdraws from consideration for Jaguars' coaching job, AP source says
item.description: Tampa Bay offensive coordinator Liam Coen is no longer a candidate to be Jacksonville's next head coach.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG and ROB MAADDI AP Sports Writers, WFLA, NBC
